source.page_label: Upland Game Bird and Small Game Hunting Seasons | WGFD
source.update_note: 2026 season data from the official Wyoming Game & Fish Chapter 11 regulation (April 2026). The WGFD regulation page lists the PDF but provides no explicit last-updated date on the HTML page itself.

species.name: Ring-necked Pheasant
species.hunting_units: Multiple hunt areas with varying rules (see key notes)

licenses.name: Game Bird/Small Game 12-Month License
licenses.covers: All upland game birds and small game for 12 months

licenses.covers: All upland game birds and small game for 1 day

licenses.covers: All upland game birds and small game (youth)

licenses.covers: Game birds only (birds, not small game mammals)

licenses.covers: Small game mammals only (not game birds)

licenses.name: Sage Grouse Hunting Permit
licenses.covers: Required for hunting sage grouse in any hunt area

purchase_urls.label: Wyoming Game & Fish — License Fee List

key_notes.title: Sage grouse hunting requires a free Sage Grouse Hunting Permit in addition to a valid hunting license and conservation stamp.

sources.label: WGFD — Upland Game Bird and Small Game Hunting Seasons
sources.evidence: Permit required for any licensed hunter hunting sage grouse. Must be in possession and produced on demand.

sources.label: 2026 Wyoming Chapter 11 — Upland Game Bird and Small Game Hunting Seasons — Section 2(a)
sources.evidence: Permit required for any licensed hunter hunting sage grouse. Must be in possession and produced on demand.

key_notes.title: Sage grouse is only open in Hunt Area 1; Hunt Areas 2, 3, and 4 are closed.

sources.label: 2026 Wyoming Chapter 11 — Upland Game Bird and Small Game Hunting Seasons — Section 2(a)
sources.evidence: Sage Grouse Area 1: Sep 19 - Sep 30, 2 daily / 4 possession. Areas 2, 3, 4: CLOSED.

key_notes.title: Sharp-tailed grouse may only be hunted east of the Continental Divide.

sources.label: 2026 Wyoming Chapter 11 — Upland Game Bird and Small Game Hunting Seasons — Section 2(f)
sources.evidence: Sharp-tailed Grouse Area 1: Portion of Wyoming east of the Continental Divide.

key_notes.title: Pheasant: males only in most areas; evidence of sex (feathered head, feathered wing, or foot) must remain naturally attached.

sources.label: 2026 Wyoming Chapter 11 — Upland Game Bird and Small Game Hunting Seasons — Section 1(c)
sources.evidence: Pheasant — feathered head, feathered wing, or foot must remain naturally attached.

sources.label: 2026 Wyoming Chapter 11 — Upland Game Bird and Small Game Hunting Seasons — Section 2(g)
sources.evidence: Pheasant Area 1: Male only. Area 2 (Nov 1-30): Any pheasant (youth). Area 2 (Dec 1-31): Male only.

key_notes.title: Pheasant shooting hours vary by area: restricted to 8:00 a.m. start on weekends in some areas and 11:00 a.m. weekday start in Area 5.

sources.label: 2026 Wyoming Chapter 11 — Upland Game Bird and Small Game Hunting Seasons — Section 2(g)
sources.evidence: Area 1: 1/2 hr before sunrise - sunset (weekdays); 8:00 a.m. - sunset (weekends). Area 5: Veterans Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, weekends: 1/2 hr before sunrise - sunset; weekdays: 11:00 a.m. - sunset.

key_notes.title: A Conservation Stamp ($21.50) is required for all hunters in addition to a hunting license.
applies_to: Nonresident Game Bird/Small Game Youth License

sources.label: WGFD — License Fee List
sources.evidence: Conservation Stamp: $21.50 (resident and nonresident). All hunters must possess a valid conservation stamp.
